{{Quote|The factory on Kelada is a sign that Arakyd's success benefits the general public. Its construction and operation will provide much-needed jobs for the people of the Anarid Cluster.|[[Allion Vlenda]], as quoted by the ''[[Imperial Defense Daily]]''|<ref name="AJ14">{{JournalCite|14|Galaxywide NewsNets}}</ref>}}
The '''Anarid Cluster''' was in the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]], not far from the [[Bestine system/Legends|Bestine system]]. [[Planet/Legends|Planets]] in the cluster include [[Kelada/Legends|Kelada]].

{{Loc-stub}}
